name.description: Environment name, unique within an application family

countryCode.description: Country/region code where the environment is deployed

aadTenantId.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID that owns the environment

webClientLoginUrl.description: URL to log into the environment

webServiceUrl.description: URL to access the environment service API

locationName.description: Azure region where the database is stored

geoName.description: Azure geo where the database is stored

ringName.description: Logical ring group name (e.g., Prod, Preview)

softDeletedOn.description: When the environment was soft deleted

hardDeletePendingOn.description: When the environment will be permanently deleted

appSourceAppsUpdateCadence.description: Update cadence for installed AppSource apps
